exploration_notes: Studied the complete Elasticsearch shard allocation pipeline: AllocationService triggers reroute, which creates a RoutingAllocation and delegates to ShardsAllocator.allocate(). BalancedShardsAllocator uses a WeightFunction with 4 balance factors and an inner Balancer class that processes shards in PriorityComparator order (system > index.priority > creation date > name). For each shard/node pair, the composite AllocationDeciders (chain of AllocationDecider subclasses registered in ClusterModule.
